continuationSummary.body:
# Continuation Summary

- Priority: high
- Current mode: plan
- Last updated by run: 7b679bf8-9315-432f-8394-0561c88eaa42
- Agent: CTO (codex_local)

## Objective

Mission-critical gap per OWNER baseline 2026-05-09: DL-054 deckt anti-theater, aber kein DXZ-Risk-Check. EA kann P0..P8 PASSen und am ersten T6-Tag account killen. Bauen + retroaktiv validieren.

## Acceptance Criteria

No explicit acceptance criteria captured.

## Recent Concrete Actions

No blocker-dependent implementation work was resumed.

## Files / Routes Touched

## Blockers / Decisions

## Next Action

- Resume implementation from the acceptance criteria, latest comments, and this summary.
